@sepo-agent /implement

Run a tending pass per `.skills/garden/SKILL.md`. Definition of done: no
orphan idea notes, maturity statuses reviewed (promotions/demotions applied
with `tended:` updated), topic maps current, any pruning noted in today's
diary, and `npm run check:site` passes.

<!-- To get a garden health report first instead, replace /implement above with /answer. -->
